title: Maison d' Hermine 100% Cotton Oven Mitt & Pot Holder Set (19 x 33 cm & 20 x 20 cm) Heat Resistant BBQ Cooking Gloves with Loop for Christmas Decorations Baking Handling Hot Pans (Christmas Dew)
features: Unique Design: Inspired from Europe, featuring exquisite watercolor artwork with each design embodies over 120 hours of hand-painted artistry. The rich hues and fine detailing make them perfect for holiday tables, autumn decorations, or festive Christmas decorations

Package Includes: Set includes 1 oven mitt (19 x 33 cm) and 1 pot holder (20 x 20 cm), perfect for baking, roasting, and cooking. Made from 100% cotton for reliable heat protection. Designed in Europe and made in India

Premium Quality: Crafted from quilted 100% cotton, this heat-resistant oven mitt and pot holder set protects your hands from hot cookware. Each piece features a built-in hanging loop for easy storage and quick access. This versatile set is perfect for everyday home kitchens, farmhouse kitchens, hotels, restaurants, and bakeries

Easy care & maintenance: Machine wash warm with like colors, do not bleach. Tumble dry low and warm iron if needed. Designed to maintain its softness, color, and protective qualities even after repeated use

Important safety note: Keep away from naked flame. Use this product with the utmost care when handling hot items in order to protect your hands. If you feel the item is too hot, touch the item cautiously with this product to assess the heat before handling it
